meta.description: Scrapes 4 Zambian job sites every 12h. LLM via OpenRouter (google/gemini-2.5-flash). Ingest auth via INGEST_API_KEY env only.
meta.exportNote: Import into n8n; set OPENROUTER_API_KEY (+ optional OPENROUTER_MODEL) in n8n env; set INGEST_API_KEY.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL || $env.LLM_MODEL || 'google/gemini-2.5-flash', max_tokens: 32768, temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.geminiBody.contents[0].parts[0].text }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL || $env.LLM_MODEL || 'google/gemini-2.5-flash', max_tokens: 32768, temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.geminiBody.contents[0].parts[0].text }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL || $env.LLM_MODEL || 'google/gemini-2.5-flash', max_tokens: 32768, temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.geminiBody.contents[0].parts[0].text }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL || $env.LLM_MODEL || 'google/gemini-2.5-flash', max_tokens: 32768, temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.geminiBody.contents[0].parts[0].text }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{message:"No jobs found in this scrape run",ts:new Date().toISOString()}}];
